mapper.sql: id, source_code, source_name, source_url, api_url, source_type, status, last_sync_at, created_at, updated_at

id, source_code, source_model_id, source_model_name, source_provider_code, source_provider_name, source_url, source_llm_type, source_llm_type_code, source_tag_type, source_context_length, source_capabilities_json, source_last_update_time, source_description, raw_json, normalized_name, normalized_family, model_type, tags_json, capabilities_json, context_window, max_output_tokens, languages_json, logical_model_id, sync_status, sync_hash, last_seen_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from external_model_sources order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into external_model_sources(source_code, source_name, source_url, api_url, source_type, status) values(#{sourceCode}, #{sourceName}, #{sourceUrl}, #{apiUrl}, #{sourceType}, #{status})

insert into external_model_items( source_code, source_model_id, source_model_name, source_provider_code, source_provider_name, source_url, source_llm_type, source_llm_type_code, source_tag_type, source_context_length, source_capabilities_json, source_last_update_time, source_description, raw_json, normalized_name, normalized_family, model_type, tags_json, capabilities_json, context_window, max_output_tokens, languages_json, logical_model_id, sync_status, sync_hash, last_seen_at ) values ( #{sourceCode}, #{sourceModelId}, #{sourceModelName}, #{sourceProviderCode}, #{sourceProviderName}, #{sourceUrl}, #{sourceLlmType}, #{sourceLlmTypeCode}, #{sourceTagType}, #{sourceContextLength}, #{sourceCapabilitiesJson}, #{sourceLastUpdateTime}, #{sourceDescription}, #{rawJson}, #{normalizedName}, #{normalizedFamily}, #{modelType}, #{tagsJson}, #{capabilitiesJson}, #{contextWindow}, #{maxOutputTokens}, #{languagesJson}, #{logicalModelId}, #{syncStatus}, #{syncHash}, #{lastSeenAt} )
mapper.update: update external_model_items set source_model_name = #{sourceModelName}, source_provider_code = #{sourceProviderCode}, source_provider_name = #{sourceProviderName}, source_url = #{sourceUrl}, source_llm_type = #{sourceLlmType}, source_llm_type_code = #{sourceLlmTypeCode}, source_tag_type = #{sourceTagType}, source_context_length = #{sourceContextLength}, source_capabilities_json = #{sourceCapabilitiesJson}, source_last_update_time = #{sourceLastUpdateTime}, source_description = #{sourceDescription}, raw_json = #{rawJson}, normalized_name = #{normalizedName}, normalized_family = #{normalizedFamily}, model_type = #{modelType}, tags_json = #{tagsJson}, capabilities_json = #{capabilitiesJson}, context_window = #{contextWindow}, max_output_tokens = #{maxOutputTokens}, languages_json = #{languagesJson}, sync_status = #{syncStatus}, sync_hash = #{syncHash}, last_seen_at = #{lastSeenAt} where id = #{id}
